name: vision_project
observations: 65+ operator tools for desktop control, OCR, browser, files, shell
Memory stored in memory.json, logs in chat_events.log

name: api_keys_status
observations: INVALID: GOOGLE_API_KEY (reported as leaked by Google)

name: system_environment
observations: OS: Windows 11 Home, MSI Thin 15 B13UC
Ollama models stored at F:\models (OLLAMA_MODELS env var set)

name: vision_providers
observations: GitHub Models: cloud via Azure inference API
Fallback order: github -> groq -> gemini -> deepseek -> openai -> mistral -> anthropic -> xai

name: vision_voice_pipeline
observations: STT cascade: ElevenLabs scribe_v1 -> Groq whisper -> faster-whisper tiny
TTS cascade: ElevenLabs WS stream -> Windows OneCore -> pyttsx3
DO NOT change VAD thresholds without explicit instruction

name: coding_conventions
observations: Line length: 120 chars (Ruff enforced, not Black)
All new functions need return type annotations
dict -> dict[str, Any], Queue -> Queue[T], Task -> Task[None]
New tools need 3 changes: TOOLS schema + exec_tool handler + _EL_TOOL_NAMES
broadcast() must use list(clients) snapshot to avoid RuntimeError
APITimeoutError must come before APIConnectionError in except clauses

name: ultron_project
observations: Core modules: ai_brain.py, file_manager.py, system_control.py, vision_system.py
Integration plan exists but not yet merged into Vision
ULTRON AIBrain is a wrapper around OpenAI — Vision already does this natively
